summary: Recording is mislabeled; reviewers flag incorrect date and identifier with no comments on audio or performance.
review: The handful of reviews focus almost entirely on the wrong metadata – several users point out that the tape is from March 27‑28 1989 in Atlanta, not a 1987 show, and request its removal. No reviewer mentions sound quality, mix, or musical highlights, leaving the actual performance undocumented.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviewers gave 4‑star ratings (but only about correct dating) and two gave 0 stars due to the misidentification; average rating is low and there is no performance or audio information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound quality; reviewers only discuss incorrect identifier and date.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on the musical flow or set structure.
